ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The most popular .NET UI client technology

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Humanizr/Humanizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Humanizr/Humanizer
Language: c%23
Humanizer meets all your .NET needs for manipulating and displaying strings, enums, dates, times, timespans, numbers and quantities

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kareadita/Kavita
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kareadita/Kavita
Language: c%23
Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gibbed/SteamAchievementManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gibbed/SteamAchievementManager
Language: c%23
A manager for game achievements in Steam.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greenshot/greenshot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greenshot/greenshot
Language: c%23
Greenshot for Windows - for more information look here:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance
Language: c%23
Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: romanvht/ByeDPIManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/romanvht/ByeDPIManager
Language: c%23
Мини утилита для запуска ByeDPI + ProxiFyre под Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
Language: c%23
Windows/macOS/Linux GUI client for GIT users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unchihugo/FluentFlyout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unchihugo/FluentFlyout
Language: c%23
The modern Flyout app for Windows 11, built with Fluent 2 Design principles. Media Flyouts, Taskbar Widgets and more.
